description: Project-level Claude Code settings for the Yu-Gi-Oh GX Spirit Caller decomp. Hooks enforce ruff/test/invariants gates so the agent catches drift in-loop rather than at CI, and capture session-end summaries to a shared inbox so the brain can read what the other agents said without manual copy-paste. Keep in sync with docs/decomp-workflow.md § Local setup extras. Hook interpreter is `python3` — macOS ships no plain `python` since 3.x (Apple's bundled CLT only provides `python3`); Linux + Windows both have `python3` on PATH by convention. Don't change to `python`.
